name: libspa-0.2-bluetooth
title: libspa-0.2-bluetooth
summary: libraries for the PipeWire multimedia server - bluetooth plugins
description:
libraries for the PipeWire multimedia server - bluetooth plugins
PipeWire is a server and user space API to deal with multimedia
pipelines. This includes:
.
- Making available sources of audio and video (such as from a capture devices
or application provided streams) and multiplexing this with clients.
- Accessing sources of audio and video for consumption.
- Generating graphs for audio and video processing.
.
This package contains a plugin to make Bluetooth audio devices such as
speakers and headsets available to the PipeWire server.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libspa-0.2-bluetooth because libraries for the PipeWire multimedia server - bluetooth plugins.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libspa-0.2-bluetooth as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libspa-0.2-bluetooth with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libspa-0.2-bluetooth --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
